item.description:
NVBeacon is a native macOS menu bar app for monitoring remote NVIDIA GPU servers over SSH with `nvidia-smi`, process exit alerts, and GPU idle notifications.
- Added automatic "my process" detection based on the active SSH username, with highlighting for matching remote processes and the GPUs they occupy. - Reloaded GPU process details every time a row is expanded so VRAM usage and process metadata stay current instead of reusing stale cached values. - Added CI-ready Developer ID signing and notarization support to the release workflow for signed DMG releases and notarized Sparkle updates.
